definitions.text: A person who raises a child (which they have made, adopted, fostered, taken as their own, etc.). .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: After both her parents were killed in a forest fire, Sonia was adopted by her aunt and uncle.

definitions.text: A person who has had a baby; this person in relation to their child or children.
To act as parent, to raise or rear.
To provide a parent object for one or more other objects, which become the children.
